narrative:
Tallmadge 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,036 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
